external_services.service_name: Certification of Net Income of Employees in Application to Multi-Purpose Loan made to Home Development Mutual Fund (PagIBIG)
external_services.office: Lipa City Accounting Office – Accounting Division
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Certification of Net Income of Employees in Application to Multi-Purpose

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Accounting Division to request certification of net income and submit requirements. Wait for processing.
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Acknowledge request and receive requirements; 1.2 Assess validity and verify records; 1.3 Process certification; 1.4 Sign certification for approval.

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the duly signed MPL form.

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Employee ID and any government-issued ID – 1 photocopy each
checklist_of_requirements.source: Requesting party/ applicant or Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Filled-up HDMF Multi-purpose Loan Application Form – 1 original copy

external_services.service_name: Issuance of BIR Form 2306 and/or 2307 to Job Order/ Contract of Service Workers and Consultants
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of BIR Form 2306 and_or 2307 to Job Order_ Contract of Service

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Accounting Division to request issuance of BIR Form 2306/2307 and submit request letter. Wait for processing.
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive and acknowledge request; 1.2 Verify correctness of information; 1.3 Gather relevant data; 1.4 Generate BIR Form; 1.5 Sign BIR Form.
steps.person_responsible: Admin Assistant III / Assistant City Accountant / City Accountant

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Certification of Premium and Loan Amortization Remittance made to Government Service Insurance System (GSIS)
external_services.office: Lipa City Accounting Office – Accounting Division
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Certification of Premium and Loan Amortization Remittance

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Accounting Office to request issuance of certification and submit BP Number. Wait for processing.
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Acknowledge request and verify BP Number; 1.2 Verify records; 1.3 Process certification; 1.4 Sign certification.

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: GSIS Business Partner (BP) Number - 1 original and 1 photocopy

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Certification of Premium Remittances made to Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PhilHealth)
external_services.office: Lipa City Accounting Office – Accounting Division
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Certification of Premium Remittances made to Philippine

steps.client_step: 1. Transmit disbursement voucher with complete supporting documents.
steps.agency_action: Receive, assign DV number; review allotment; pre-audit voucher; review; endorse for compliance; re-check; certify Box A; forward to City Treasurer.
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV / Administrative Officer II / Management Audit Analysts / Accountant IV / City Accountant / Admin Assistant IV

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PhilHealth Identification Number – 1 original and 1 photocopy

external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Pre-audit of Vouchers for Procurement through Public Bidding
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2B – Government to Businesses, G2G – Government to Government

steps.client_step: 1. Transmit disbursement voucher with complete supporting documents.
steps.agency_action: Receive and assign DV number; review allotment; pre-audit; review; endorse; re-check; certify Box A; forward to Treasurer.
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV / Administrative Officer II / Audit Analysts / Accountant IV / City Accountant / Admin Assistant IV

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City General Services Office or Lipa City Engineering Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Complete supporting documents in accordance with Revised IRR of RA 9184, COA Circular 2012-001

external_services.service_name: Pre-audit of Disbursement Vouchers – Procurement of Goods and Services through Alternative Modes of Procurement
external_services.office: Lipa City Accounting Office – Internal Audit Division
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Pre-audit of Disbursement Vouchers – Procurement of Goods and

steps.client_step: 1. Transmit payroll with complete supporting documents.
steps.agency_action: Receive and assign payroll number; review allotment; pre-audit payroll; review; certify Box A; forward to Treasurer.
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV / Administrative Officer II / Audit Analysts / Accountant IV / City Accountant / Admin Assistant IV

checklist_of_requirements.source: End User Unit/Lipa City GSO/Engineering Office/BAC Secretariat

external_services.service_name: Pre-Audit of Payrolls – Salaries and Wages
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: General Payroll Form – 1 original and 2 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Personnel Office (HR) / Department Concerned

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Obligation Request (manual and system generated) – 1 original copy
Certificate of Appearance – 1 original and 1 photocopy
Accomplishment Report (for Casual and Job Orders)

steps.client_step: 1. Transmit payroll with complete supporting documents.
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive, record and assign payroll number; stamp supporting documents as 'passed'.
1.2 Review allotment and obligation; update appropriate registry.
1.3 Pre-audit payroll to determine completeness and verify computations.
steps.person_responsible: Management Audit Analyst I-III / Fiscal Examiner III / Fiscal Clerk II / Accounting Clerk II

steps.agency_action: 1.4 Review pre-audited voucher and supporting documents.
1.5 Certify on BOX A of disbursement voucher.
1.6 Forward certified voucher to Lipa City Treasurer’s Office.

who_may_avail: LGU Departments Implementing Social Services Projects

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Filled-up application form, Payroll, Obligation Request, Approved work program, ID photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Transmit payroll with complete supporting documents.
steps.agency_action: Receive and assign payroll number; review allotment; pre-audit payroll; review; certify Box A; forward to Treasurer.
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV / Administrative Officer II / Audit Analysts / Accountant IV / City Accountant / Admin Assistant IV
